identity_description: 20-year-old Chinese man, recognizable natural face, calm but alert expression
face_features: oval face, straight eyebrows, single eyelids, medium nose bridge, small scar near right eyebrow
hair: short slightly messy black hair, fixed length and parting
body_features: slim athletic build, average height, fixed shoulder width and limb proportions
default_wardrobe: dark charcoal hooded jacket, washed black T-shirt, dark cargo pants, worn black sneakers
signature_props: silver analog watch on left wrist
immutable_rules: scar remains on right eyebrow, watch remains on left wrist, no wardrobe redesign
